items.name: GitLab
items.blurb: DevOps platform company that pioneered the all-remote model with a publicly documented handbook.

items.name: Automattic
items.blurb: Fully distributed company behind WordPress.com, WooCommerce, and Tumblr with no headquarters.

items.name: Zapier
items.blurb: Workflow automation platform that has operated as a fully remote company since its founding.

items.name: Buffer
items.blurb: Social media scheduling tool known for radical transparency and fully distributed team structure.

items.name: Doist
items.blurb: Creator of Todoist and Twist, operating as an async-first remote company across many countries.

items.name: Toggl
items.blurb: Time tracking and project planning company fully distributed across dozens of countries.

items.name: Hotjar
items.blurb: Behavior analytics tool company that operates fully remotely, acquired by Contentsquare.

items.name: DuckDuckGo
items.blurb: Privacy-focused search engine and browser operating as a fully remote distributed company.

items.name: Wikimedia Foundation
items.blurb: Nonprofit supporting Wikipedia and other free knowledge projects with a remote-distributed team.

items.name: Grafana Labs
items.blurb: Observability company behind Grafana OSS operating as a remote-first organization globally.

items.name: Sourcegraph
items.blurb: Code intelligence platform that operates as an all-remote company with an open employee handbook.

items.name: Remote.com
items.blurb: Employer of record and HR platform for global teams, itself fully remote by design.

items.name: Deel
items.blurb: Global payroll and compliance platform for remote teams, employing a distributed workforce.

items.name: Oyster HR
items.blurb: Global employment platform enabling remote hiring, itself structured as an all-remote company.

items.name: 1Password
items.blurb: Password manager and secrets management platform that operates with a remote-first culture.
